name: Countdown Moment
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of exploration, add 1 card "Countdown Moment: 5" to the deck. "Countdown Moment: 5": Draw 1 card after played, shuffle the next "Countdown Moment" into the Discard Pile, {Destroy}. "Countdown Moment: 0": Draw 3 cards, gain 3 Arithmetica, and have a [StateArg1]% chance to shuffle "Countdown Moment: 5" into the Discard Pile, {Retain}, {Destroy}.
